title: Verify the shared Daytona code-factory environment boots with the expected tools

goal.value: Verify the shared Daytona code-factory environment boots with the expected tools

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json','utf8')); const lines=['# Daytona Environment Smoke','', 'ok=' + report.ok, '', '## Tools', ...report.checks.map((check)=>'- ' + check.cmd + ' status=' + check.status + (check.stdout ? ' output=' + check.stdout.split('
')[0] : '')), '', '## Env', ...Object.entries(report.env).map(([key,value])=>'- ' + key + '=' + value)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.md', lines.join('
')+'
'); console.log(lines.join('
')); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);"

test -n "${MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR:-}"; test -d "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; test -w "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; mkdir -p "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke"; printf '%s\n' volume-ready > "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"; cat "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"

mkdir -p .workflow/fabro; node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const run=(cmd,args=[])=>{const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:45000}); return {cmd:[cmd,...args].join(' '), status:r.status, stdout:(r.stdout||'').trim().slice(0,400), stderr:(r.stderr||'').trim().slice(0,400)};}; const toolRuns=[run('node',['--version']),run('npm',['--version']),run('bun',['--version']),run('qlty',['--version']),run('spec-kitty',['--version']),run('promptfoo',['--version']),run('fabro',['--version']),run('claude',['--version']),run('codex',['--version']),run('curl',['-fsS','--max-time','20','https://api.github.com/rate_limit'])]; const env=['OPENROUTER_API_KEY','DAYTONA_API_KEY','LINEAR_API_KEY','FABRO_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN','FABRO_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID','APIFY_TOKEN'].reduce((acc,key)=>{const value=process.env[key]||''; const unresolved=value.charCodeAt(0)===123 && value.charCodeAt(1)===123; acc[key]=Boolean(value && !unresolved); return acc;},{}); const required=['node --version','npm --version','bun --version','qlty --version','spec-kitty --version','promptfoo --version','fabro --version','curl -fsS --max-time 20 https://api.github.com/rate_limit']; const failed=toolRuns.filter((check)=>required.includes(check.cmd) && check.status!==0); const report={ok:failed.length===0, failed, checks:toolRuns, env}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report,null,2)); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);"

goal.String: Verify the shared Daytona code-factory environment boots with the expected tools

spec.graph_source:
digraph DaytonaEnvironmentSmoke {
    graph [
        goal="Verify the shared Daytona code-factory environment boots with the expected tools",
        persona="workflow-registry",
        inputs="none",
        outputs="environment_report",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .coding { provider: openrouter; model: qwen/qwen3.6-plus; reasoning_effort: medium; }
            .review { provider: openrouter; model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: medium; }
        "
    ]

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    check_environment [
        label="Check Environment",
        type="command",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/fabro; node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const run=(cmd,args=[])=>{const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:45000}); return {cmd:[cmd,...args].join(' '), status:r.status, stdout:(r.stdout||'').trim().slice(0,400), stderr:(r.stderr||'').trim().slice(0,400)};}; const toolRuns=[run('node',['--version']),run('npm',['--version']),run('bun',['--version']),run('qlty',['--version']),run('spec-kitty',['--version']),run('promptfoo',['--version']),run('fabro',['--version']),run('claude',['--version']),run('codex',['--version']),run('curl',['-fsS','--max-time','20','https://api.github.com/rate_limit'])]; const env=['OPENROUTER_API_KEY','DAYTONA_API_KEY','LINEAR_API_KEY','FABRO_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN','FABRO_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID','APIFY_TOKEN'].reduce((acc,key)=>{const value=process.env[key]||''; const unresolved=value.charCodeAt(0)===123 && value.charCodeAt(1)===123; acc[key]=Boolean(value && !unresolved); return acc;},{}); const required=['node --version','npm --version','bun --version','qlty --version','spec-kitty --version','promptfoo --version','fabro --version','curl -fsS --max-time 20 https://api.github.com/rate_limit']; const failed=toolRuns.filter((check)=>required.includes(check.cmd) && check.status!==0); const report={ok:failed.length===0, failed, checks:toolRuns, env}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report,null,2)); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    write_report [
        label="Write Report",
        type="command",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json','utf8')); const lines=['# Daytona Environment Smoke','', 'ok=' + report.ok, '', '## Tools', ...report.checks.map((check)=>'- ' + check.cmd + ' status=' + check.status + (check.stdout ? ' output=' + check.stdout.split('\\n')[0] : '')), '', '## Env', ...Object.entries(report.env).map(([key,value])=>'- ' + key + '=' + value)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.md', lines.join('\\n')+'\\n'); console.log(lines.join('\\n')); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    check_agent_state [
        label="Check Agent State Volume",
        type="command",
        script="test -n \"${MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR:-}\"; test -d \"$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR\"; test -w \"$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR\"; mkdir -p \"$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke\"; printf '%s\\n' volume-ready > \"$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt\"; cat \"$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt\""
    ]

    fail_environment [
        label="Fail Environment",
        type="command",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const body=fs.existsSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json') ? fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json','utf8') : '{}'; console.error(body); process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    start -> check_environment
    check_environment -> check_agent_state
    check_agent_state -> write_report [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    check_agent_state -> fail_environment [label="Fail"]
    write_report -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    write_report -> fail_environment [label="Fail"]
}
